project_type: Next.js 16 App Router frontend with shadcn/ui + Tailwind CSS v4
build_system: pnpm with next build, biome for linting/formatting
test_framework: No test framework configured (no test files found)
verification_instructions: 1. Run pnpm build to verify TypeScript compiles and Next.js builds. 2. Run pnpm lint to verify biome linting passes.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET network mode. Node v22 and pnpm 10 available. No test suite exists, so verification is build + lint only.
contribution_requirements: Uses biome for formatting (2-space indent). Uses import aliases (@/). All components in src/components/. UI primitives in src/components/ui/. Feature components in feature folders (expenses/, bill-statements/). Uses shadcn/ui pattern for UI components.
key_patterns: Components use 'use client' directive. State management via React hooks. Services layer for API calls. Types in src/types/. Constants in src/lib/constants.ts. Current filter styling uses neo-brutalist classes (neoControlClass, neoButtonClass, neoPopoverClass) with heavy box-shadows and thick borders. The expenses page Card also has neo-brutalist border-2 and box-shadow styling. The calendar is the standard shadcn/ui Calendar wrapping react-day-picker v9.
directory_structure: src/app/(dashboard)/ - page routes. src/components/ui/ - shadcn primitives. src/components/expenses/ - expense feature components. src/components/bill-statements/ - bill statement feature components. src/lib/ - utilities, constants, auth. src/services/ - API service layer. src/types/ - TypeScript type definitions.
